description: PR 4 — transform-kind classification on lineage edges

master_baseline_session.note: Recorded at start of this session on master (v1.12.0)

pr4_after.note: v1.13.0 on feat/transform-kind-classification; third run on the same DB (no cold-start cache benefit)

profile.verdict: PASS — delta is negative (improvement, within noise); well under the 5s cap

transform_distribution.query: SELECT transform, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "COLUMN_LINEAGE" GROUP BY transform ORDER BY cnt DESC
transform_distribution.note: No 'SELECT' rows — every edge has been classified. STAR_EXPANSION edges are emitted by graph-backend star-expansion, not by _extract_column_lineage; they retain their existing value.

consumer_audit.tools.py_L839_L880: row.get('transform') or 'SELECT' — truthy new values pass through as Mermaid labels; 'SELECT' fallback only fires when transform is None/empty. Intended more-informative labels.
consumer_audit._REASON_MAP_L707: Keys on STAR_EXPANSION/UNKNOWN/None — never on 'SELECT'. Unaffected by new values.
consumer_audit.models.py_L78: Doc-string only (field-description examples). No logic change.
